items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario involving an audit trail between an AI agent and a human actor. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual simulation of this scenario or the capturing of traces and snapshots as required. The lack of specific API reads or persisted state checks to confirm the expected behavior leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this step.
